g.title: pwiz_module_detail
g.text: one node per .cpp/.hpp pair (test fixtures omitted); each group is its own row, top-to-bottom

a.xlink:title: Same as SpectrumListBase but for ChromatogramList. Ported as MsData/Chromatograms/ChromatogramListBase.cs.
MSData-specific diff specialization (knows how to walk Run/Spectrum/CV nesting). Ported as MsData/Diff/MSDataDiff.cs. Drives msconvert-cpp parity tests.
32-/64-bit float + zlib + numpress encoder for mzML binaryDataArrays. Ported as MsData/BinaryDataEncoder.cs with full numpress (Pic/Linear/Slof) + MS-NUMPRESS Apache port.
Pre-2010 adapter that synthesized PSI-MS terms from old free-text fields. Not needed: modern vendor readers set CV terms directly. SKIPPED.

Top-level MSData container model. Ported as MsData/MSData.cs + Run.cs + FileDescription.cs + Software.cs + Scan/Spectrum/Chromatogram property bags. All field names PascalCase, IDisposable for vendor handles.

✓ calculateSHA1Checksums → MSDataFile.CalculateSha1Checksums() ✓ WriteConfig + Format → Pwiz.Data.MsData.WriteConfig + WriteFormat ✓ Precision / Compression → Encoding.BinaryPrecision / BinaryCompression ✓ write(msd,path,cfg) → MSDataFile.Write — dispatches to MzmlWriter / MzxmlWriter / MgfSerializer based on WriteConfig.Format ✗ detect(filename) → not yet ported; Reader.Identify() does sniff-by-extension
PARTIAL — multi-file merge into a single MSData. Done inline inside MsConvert/Converter.MergeRun (concatenates SourceFiles + Software + spectra). No standalone class yet.
Resolves IDREF cross-references inside an MSData graph (e.g., scan.spectrumRef → spectrum). Ported as MsData/References.cs.
Lightweight per-scan metadata struct. Ported as MsData/Spectra/SpectrumInfo.cs.
Scan-time spectrum iterator. Ported as MsData/Spectra/SpectrumIterator.cs.
Base class with shared SpectrumList plumbing. Ported as MsData/Spectra/SpectrumListBase.cs.
LRU-caching SpectrumList decorator. Ported as MsData/Spectra/SpectrumListCache.cs.
Spectrum-list pass-through base class. Ported as Analysis/SpectrumListWrapper.cs.
MS-NUMPRESS algorithm. Ported as MsData/Encoding/MsNumpress.cs (line-by-line port).
MGF writer (Mascot Generic Format — MS2 peak-list export). Ported as MsData/Mgf/MgfSerializer.cs (text-mode writer with TPP-compat title formats).
Streaming SHA-1 + byte counter wrapper around an std::ostream. Ported as MsData/Mzml/HashingCountingStream.cs.
Legacy MS1/MS2/CMS1/CMS2 format. NOT PORTED — narrow user base.
Streaming mzML element-by-element reader + writer. Ported as MsData/Mzml/MzmlReader.cs + MzmlWriter.cs (System.Xml.XmlReader/XmlWriter instead of cpp's SAXParser/XMLWriter).

HDF5-based mz5 serializer. READ ported as Mz5ReaderAdapter + Mz5Connection + Mz5ReferenceRead + Mz5SpectrumList + Mz5ChromatogramList (under MsData/Mz5/). Writer not done — round-trip tests shell out to cpp msconvert --mz5 for the write side.
Full mzML reader+writer. Ported as MsData/Mzml/MzmlReader.cs + MzmlWriter.cs.
Full mzXML reader+writer. Ported as MsData/MzXml/MzxmlReader.cs + MzxmlWriter.cs.
Format_Text output (a pwiz-internal pretty-print). Never wired in any GUI/CLI we care about. NOT PORTED.
mzML spectrum/chromatogram offset index reader. Ported as MsData/Mzml/MzmlIndexReader.cs. Reads <indexList> trailer to seek to individual spectra without parsing the full file.
Legacy Bruker BTDX text format. NOT PORTED — superseded by Bruker .d.
Lazy-load MGF SpectrumList. Ported as MsData/Mgf/SpectrumList_Mgf.cs.

mz5 ChromatogramList. Ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5ChromatogramList.cs — lazy slicer over ChromatogramTime + ChromatogramIntensity via ChromatogramIndex. No translator (mz5's delta encoding only applies to m/z, not time).
Legacy MS1/MS2 SpectrumList. NOT PORTED — paired with Serializer_MSn.

mz5 SpectrumList. Ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5SpectrumList.cs — lazy slicer over the global SpectrumMZ + SpectrumIntensity datasets via SpectrumIndex end-offsets. Reverses delta-mz encoding via cumulative sum when FileInformation.deltaMZ is set.
Lazy-load mzML SpectrumList implementation. Ported as MsData/Mzml/SpectrumList_Mzml.cs.
Lazy-load mzXML SpectrumList. Ported as MsData/MzXml/SpectrumList_Mzxml.cs.
Lazy-load mzML ChromatogramList. Ported as MsData/Mzml/ChromatogramList_Mzml.cs.
Reader dispatcher (mzML / mzXML / MGF + vendor extension points). Ported as MsData/Readers/ReaderList.cs. Vendor readers register at startup (see MsConvert/Converter ctor).
IReader interface + ReaderConfig. Ported as MsData/IReader.cs.
Bounded LRU cache (least-recently-used eviction). Ported as Util/Collections/LruCache.cs. Used by SpectrumList_ChargeFromIsotope for parent MS1 spectra.
Legacy C-API shim wrapping pwiz to look like ISB RAMP — used by older readers. Not used by msconvert / Skyline. SKIPPED.
mz5/HDF5 file-level config. Ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5Configuration.cs + Mz5Datasets.cs (dataset-name enum + version/length constants matching cpp).
Multi-threaded spectrum reader (used by mzML writer to overlap read+encode). Not ported: pwiz-sharp is single-threaded for now; the speed gap is small for modern hardware vs. the porting risk.

Canonical example MSData fixture builder. Ported as MsData/Examples.cs. InitializeTiny → 5 spectra (MS1/MS2 CID/no-data/MS2 ETD+CID/MALDI) + 2 chromatograms (TIC + SIC). AddMiapeExampleMetadata layers MIAPE-compliant metadata on top. Used by round-trip / Diff / serializer parity tests.

mz5 H5File wrapper. Read paths ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5Connection.cs — file open + ReadFull/ReadDoubles + vlen-reclaim + refcounted shared ownership for SpectrumList + ChromatogramList. Write paths not done.

mzMLb (HDF5-backed mzML) connection wrapper. Ported as Pwiz.Data.MsData.MzMlb.MzMlbConnection (HDF.PInvoke-backed, exposes mzML XML as a seekable Stream + typed Append/Read for binary datasets). Reader/Writer adapters at MzMlbReaderAdapter / MzMlbWriter; integration into MzmlReader/MzmlWriter via IExternalBinarySource/Sink. Bidirectional cpp parity verified.

mz5 typed structs. Ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5Types.cs — all 25 POD record types with HDF5 compound type registrations whose field names match cpp's exactly (HDF5 matches compound fields by name on read — mismatches silently leave struct fields at zero).

mz5 ID-resolution on read. Ported as MsData/Mz5/Mz5ReferenceRead.cs — walks document-level metadata in cpp's dependency order (CVs → CVReference → CVParam/UserParam/RefParam tables → ParamGroups → SourceFiles / Software / DataProcessings / Samples / ScanSettings / InstrumentConfigurations → Run → Spectrum/Chromatogram lists). Memoizes CVID lookups.
mz5 ID-resolution on write. NOT PORTED — read-only port.
mz5 ↔ MSData translation. Reverse direction (delta-mz cumulative-sum + log-intensity decode on read) is in Mz5Connection / Mz5SpectrumList; forward translation for write not done.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
Not yet ported. No specific reason recorded.
